narrative:
Hill 2-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,412 registered voters, with 53.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.8%, a clear Republican lean of 6.9 percentage points.
